yesterdayStoryline.headline: Saka hat-trick seals England’s 6-4 win in ten-goal thriller
yesterdayStoryline.subtitle: Three Lions take bronze after chaotic match against France in Miami.

todayStoryline.headline: Spain meet Argentina in MetLife final
todayStoryline.subtitle: Kickoff 20:00 UK / 15:00 ET as champions defend title in New Jersey.

facts.home: Spain’s squad trains at the RFEF Ciudad del Fútbol in Las Rozas near Madrid.
facts.away: Alfredo Di Stéfano, Argentina-born legend, never played at a World Cup finals tournament.

news.headline: Major diplomatic meeting addresses food and energy security
news.body: Leaders met to discuss coordinated responses to rising food and energy risks. Talks focused on supply resilience and emergency measures.
